zh.lifeSummary: 當Adélis DE GUINES-DE SAINT OMER於1155年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯時，她的父親Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gand53歲，母親Maud St Omer45歲。她和Arnold de Thérouanne II至少有1個兒子。她去世於1206年在她的家鄉享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adélis DE GUINES-DE SAINT OMER于1155年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯时，她的父亲Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gand53岁，母亲Maud St Omer45岁。她和Arnold de Thérouanne II至少有1个儿子。她去世于1206年在她的家乡享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: SAINT
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Cyr, Remy.

English and French: nickname for a particularly pious individual, from Old French and Middle English saint(e), seint(e) ‘holy’ (from Latin sanctus ‘blameless, holy’). The vocabulary word was occasionally used in the Middle Ages as a personal name and this may have given rise to some instances of the surname.
English: perhaps a nickname for someone who wore, made, or sold girdles, from Middle English ceint, seint, saint ‘girdle’ (Old French ceint, Latin cinctum). Compare Center .

variants.name: Center
meanings: English and Scottish (Aberdeenshire): metonymic occupational name from Middle English, Old French ceinture, seinture ‘girdle’, denoting someone who made or sold girdles, or perhaps a nickname for someone who wore a distinctive girdle.
English: variant of   Senter   1.
Americanized form of German   Zehnder   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Sant
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Krishan, Anagha, Anjali, Arvind, Deepak, Milind, Nilima, Ravindra, Sanjeev, Sanjiv, Vasudev.
English (Cheshire and Staffordshire): variant of   Saint  .
Italian (northeastern): variant of   Santo  .

variants.name: Sante
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Luc, Camille, Lucien.  Spanish Alejandro, Anselmo, Carlos, Emilio, Jesusa, Jorge.
French (also Santé): probably a nickname for a healthy person, from French santé ‘good health’.

Galician, Asturian-Leonese, and Spanish (southwestern): habitational name from one of several places called Sante, in Galicia, Portugal, and Asturias, from a Visigothic personal name. This surname is also found in the Philippines.

nameMeanings.name: OMER
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Ahmed, Mohamed, Mohammed, Tarig, Mohammad, Murad, Abdirahman, Abdul, Abdulla, Abdulrahim, Ali, Amin.
Muslim: variant of   Omar  .
German: variant of   Ohmer  .

variants.name: Omar
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Mohammed, Mohamed, Ali, Omar, Ahmed, Ahmad, Hassan, Abdul, Husam, Khalid, Mohammad, Mohd.

Muslim: from the Arabic personal name Omar of uncertain etymology, found almost exclusively among Sunni Muslims. It is thought to be related to Arabic ʿāmir ‘prosperous, full of life, large, substantial’ (see Amir 2). The root word ʿumr means ‘life’. ʿUmar bin al-Khaṭṭāb was the second of the ‘rightly guided’ caliphs (ruled 634–44); he was known by the title al-Fārūq ‘the distinguisher’, i.e. one who distinguishes between truth and falsehood. Compare Omer and Umar .
Catalan: topographic name for someone who lived by a group of elm trees, from the collective form of om ‘elm’.

nameMeanings.name: Adélis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: elaboration of Adele , now sometimes also used in the English-speaking world, with or without the accent. Adélie Land in Antarctica was named in 1840 by the French explorer Jules Dumont d'Urville in honour of his wife; the Adélie penguin (Pygoscelis adeliae) is so named because it breeds on that coastline.

en.lifeSummary: When Adélis DE GUINES-DE SAINT OMER was born in 1155, in Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gand, was 53 and her mother, Maud St Omer, was 45. She had at least 1 son with Arnold de Thérouanne II. She died in 1206, in her hometown, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adélis DE GUINES-DE SAINT OMER est née en 1155, à Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gand, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Maud St Omer, avait 45 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Arnold de Thérouanne II. Elle est décédée en 1206, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adélis DE GUINES-DE SAINT OMER 1155 in Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gand 53 und ihre Mutter Maud St Omer 45. Sie hatte mit Arnold de Thérouanne II mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1206 im Alter von 51 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adélis DE GUINES-DE SAINT OMER è nata il nel 1155 nel Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gand, aveva 53 anni e sua madre, Maud St Omer, aveva 45 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Arnold de Thérouanne II. Morì nel 1206, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 51 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Adélis DE GUINES-DE SAINT OMER(이)가 1155년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gand(은)는 53세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud St Omer(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 Arnold de Thérouanne II(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1206년 그녀의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adélis DE GUINES-DE SAINT OMER nasceu em 1155, em Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gand, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Maud St Omer, tinha 45 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adélis DE GUINES-DE SAINT OMER родилась в 1155 г. в местности пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gand было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Maud St Omer, 45. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Arnold de Thérouanne II. Она умерла в 1206 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adélis DE GUINES-DE SAINT OMER nació en 1155, en Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gand, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Maud St Omer, tenía 45 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Arnold de Thérouanne II. Murió en 1206, en su pueblo, a la edad de 51 años.
